race.comment: GILDED WATER (4) is the big unknown. He pulled up with genuine issues after dropping right out on resumption over 1800m and has been given a bit of time to get over that. His best form in the Spring stands out for this, if he can settle and race genuinely he'll go close. BANKERS CHOICE (1) broke through for another win at Sandown Hillside last time out, beating SMOKIN' ROMANS (2) by a short margin. BANKERS CHOICE is back up in the weights a touch but should go close again, SMOKIN' ROMANS was a big price there but was only second up and is suited up in trip. STAR OF INDIA (5) ran very well on ground typically too wet for him at Flemington last time. His best is good enough but he's hard to catch. NELLIE LEYLAX (6) has been okay in better races his past couple, he can kick up and take catching.
